description: True superset of /unlock_catalog.json. `entries` contains every row from the canonical catalog (provenance: 'unlock_catalog') plus every DLL the asset sweep discovered that the canonical catalog did not (provenance: 'asset_sweep'). Consumers wanting only the sweep-side delta should iterate `extension_entries` instead; UnlockCoverageTab does this so the SWEEP chip only appears on the new rows. UDS service/NRC/session dictionaries and DID maps are consumed by the same tab's reference panel.

codes.0x10: ('GeneralReject',               'ECU rejected the request for an unspecified reason')
codes.0x11: ('ServiceNotSupported',         'Service ID not implemented by this ECU')
codes.0x22: ('ConditionsNotCorrect',        'ECU is not in the correct state to do this')
codes.0x36: ('ExceededNumberOfAttempts',    'Too many wrong keys — delay or power-cycle needed')
codes.0x37: ('RequiredTimeDelayNotExpired', 'Wait period active — try again in a few seconds')
codes.0x81: ('RpmTooHigh',                  'Engine running too fast for this routine')

codes.0x02: ('ProgrammingSession',       'Flash/VIN write — usually required for destructive ops')
